headline: No meaningful vacant MF-by-right land near the subject — the as-of-right apartment-supply threat is limited. Risk concentrates in PD / corridor parcels held by development entities (entitlement-dependent), one nearby townhouse-zoned tract, and a few large commercial tracts with rezoning optionality.

ranking.rationale: Closest sizable PD tract (PCD) with SH-360 frontage in an actively-developing apartment corridor (Trailwinds 324 u adjacent). Residential/mixed plausible under a PCD plan; ~0.6 mi from the subject. Verify the concept plan.
Large private commercial (C-2) tract on the corridor, ~1.0 mi; MF not by-right but a rezoning to MF is a realistic risk given corridor momentum.
